events.event_description: U.S. diplomatic presence established in Bahrain with a Chargé d'Affaires ad interim presenting credentials, marking the opening of the U.S. mission following Bahraini independence.

evidence.quote: John Newton Jr Gatch, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1971-09-21.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy in Bahrain elevated to full ambassadorial representation when the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary presented credentials.

evidence.quote: William A Stoltzfus, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1971-12-09. Credentials presented: 1972-02-17. Appointment terminated on 1974-06-09.
